text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week has vowed to bring the spring shield of the Tenno Sho
back to Team Sirius.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as if to affirm that promise, she begins to work even harder
during our training sessions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At first, this was just another objective I set for her—another goal to
work towards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But after hearing how much this race means to her teammates, this
race has taken on a whole new meaning for Special Week. She's
determined to snag the shield and make this a race we won't forget.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So we keep on training until at long last...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've been blessed with clear skies here today at Kyoto Racecourse.
Under the shining sun, twelve Umamusume will vie for the glory of the
spring shield.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And of course, the name on everyone's lips is last year's champion,
Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But that doesn't mean we're ignoring her challengers, like the Kikuka
Sho Umamusume Seiun Sky and the Derby Umamusume Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just imagining the showdown these three are about to show us has
the audience on the edge of their seats!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Spe, good luck out there! Show us a spring Tenno Sho as inspiring as
McQueen's!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm planning on conquering this race myself someday, so run like I'm right on your heels!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll give you a race worth watching!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? That your phone?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, it's a message from Suzuka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "I've got the livestream going over here. Good luck,
Spee." Spee?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's late over there, so she must've mistyped.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm sure she's tired, but she's still watching regardless. That just
shows how much she cares.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: And she's not the only one cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Sincere Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Good luck, Special Week!

text_block_list.name: Upbeat Umamusume
text_block_list.text: We know you'll be leading the pack by the end!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
If you run anything like you did at practice, you'll win. All you need
now is confidence.
choice_data_list: Now go out there and get that shield!
Now go out there and get that shield!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
If you run anything like you did at practice, you'll win. All you need
now is confidence.
choice_data_list: Now go out there and get that shield!
Now go out there and get that shield!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Right! With my moms' dream, my own dream, and Team Sirius on my
side, there's no way I can lose!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Long time, no see. Last time we ran together was the Kikuka Sho,
right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I won that race, but who knows what'll happen today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Especially considering the look in your eye has changed.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup! I've got lots of hopes and dreams riding on today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I could say the very same thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
No matter the opponent, I have focused only on achieving what I
must... I thought that was more than enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
However, Seiun Sky, you have bested me before. As have you,
Special Week, in our last race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I understand now that you two have skills worthy of the Golden
Generation title. But know that I will emerge from this race
triumphant!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, I'll be trying pretty hard myself... But I suppose we'll find out
during the race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's give this race our all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I would expect nothing less!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: All righty then, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As we speak, twelve contenders are bracing themselves for the
grueling 3,200-meter battle ahead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Will the reigning champion come away with another victory? Or will it
be one of the two challengers from the Golden Generation?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
With each racer now in the starting gate, the spring Tenno Sho...
begins!
